title: Section 17
content: All fines imposed under this Act may be recovered in the manner prescribed by section 61 of the 1Code of Criminal Procedure 2 ***.
footnote: 1. See now the Code of Criminal Procedure, 1973 (2 of 1974). 2. The words and brackets "and such fines shall (subject to the provisions contained in the last preceding section) be applied as the Lieutenant-Governor or Chief Commissioner, as the case may be, shall from time to time direct" rep. by the A. O. 1937.
